summary: Tested 4 new admin route modules (admin_finance.py, admin_users.py, admin_fraud.py, admin_reports.py). All 64 backend tests pass - 100% success rate. All requested endpoints working correctly.

minor.issue: Ambiguous variable name 'l' in list comprehension
admin_users.py routes (/admin/users, /admin/users/{uid}) are shadowed by existing routes in server.py (lines 12762, 13178). The server.py routes are registered first so they take precedence.
minor.recommendation: Remove duplicate routes from server.py to use the new modular admin_users.py routes

action_items: Consider removing duplicate /admin/users routes from server.py (lines 12762, 13178) to use admin_users.py module routes instead
Fix ambiguous variable name 'l' in admin_fraud.py line 337
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 router modules properly extracted and integrated with correct set_db() and set_helpers() patterns
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from query projections in all routes
Good error handling with HTTPException for 404 cases
Proper pagination implemented in list endpoints
Finance module has comprehensive P&L, expenses, company wallets, reconciliation features
Fraud module has proper risk assessment calculation with multiple factors
Reports module has good chart data aggregation with date grouping
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed expenses and fraud blocks during testing (cleaned up after tests)
